text: Weekly platform sync, July 1st. Attendees: Dana, Marcus, Priya, and Tom. Dana chaired the meeting. Priya reported that the ingestion backlog dropped from 4,200 to 300 documents after the parser fix shipped on Friday. Marcus raised a concern about provenance loss in the HTML pipeline; a spike was scheduled for next sprint. Action items: Tom to draft the OCR vendor comparison, Dana to schedule the security review, Priya to close out the backlog dashboard.
